creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 181351
patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates graphics/converseen to latest version 0.9.6.2

From the upstream site:

– Added Danish Traslation
– Updated Italian Traslation
– Various bugfixes

- Q/A:
* portlint -AC: OK
* poudriere builds for {10.3,11.0}{amd64,i386}

*I would like to step up if there are any committers willing to mentor me*
